value.stringValue: Your brand has no relevant template's to send
An error occurred, please try again
An error has occurred. Interview notes have not been saved.

actionCalls.name: Send_Fast_Registration_Email_Blue_Arrow
actionCalls.label: Send Fast Registration Email Blue Arrow

actionCalls.name: Send_Reminder_Email_BA_0
actionCalls.label: Send Fast Reg Reminder Email BA

Flow.description: PT1-1884 Registration Link Sent now stamped with Registration SMS, Full Registration SMS or Reminder SMS.
Flow.interviewLabel: Screen Flow - Candidate Record Registration Flow (Migration) {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: Screen Flow - Candidate Record Registration Flow (Migration)

fields.name: Please_select_type_of_registration
fields.fieldText: Please select type of registration

fields.name: Please_select_type_of_registration1
fields.fieldText: Please select type of registration

fields.name: Please_select_type_of_registration_0
fields.fieldText: Please select type of registration

fields.name: PortalDetails
fields.fieldText: Worker Widget

fields.name: StudentImage
StudentText1
fields.fieldText: International Student has missing Term Dates, please ensure this candidate has a verified Study Timetable.

fields.name: StudentText2
fields.fieldText: International Student has no future Term Dates, please request an updated Study Timetable.

fields.name: Student3
fields.fieldText: International Student has upcoming Term Dates

fields.name: Fast_Reg_Completed
fields.fieldText: Candidate has completed fast registration

fields.name: DifferentBrand
fields.fieldText:
⚠

Candidate is owned by a different brand to yourself, change owner to update this

fields.name: EmailBounced
fields.fieldText:
⚠

Candidate email is marked as bounced

fields.name: P45_Text
fields.fieldText:
⚠

Candidate has been issued a P45, please reinstate

fields.name: NoPortalUser
fields.fieldText:
⚠

Candidate is not yet portal registered

fields.name: LoginIssue
fields.fieldText:
⚠

Candidate is having some issues logging in, reset their password using the "Reset Password" button above

fields.name: LoginIssuesMFA
fields.fieldText:
⚠

Candidate is having some issues logging in due to Multi Factor Authentication. Please ensure their mobile number is correct.

fields.name: MobileApp
fields.fieldText:
⚠

Candidate has not downloaded the Mobile App

fields.name: Android
IOS
Mobile
fields.fieldText: Mobile App Downloaded!

fields.name: Last_Login_Text
fields.fieldText:
Portal Details

Username: {!Get_User.Username}

Last Login Status: {!GetLoginHistory.Status}

Login Time: {!GetLoginHistory.LoginTime}

Device: {!GetLoginHistory.Platform}

Browser: {!GetLoginHistory.Browser}

fields.name: Regoverview
fields.fieldText: Registration Overview

fields.name: Registration_Type_Display
fields.fieldText: Registration Type: {!Get_Candidate.Registration_Type__c}

fields.name: RegistrationText
fields.fieldText: Registration Link Sent: {!Get_Candidate.Registration_Link_Sent__c}

fields.name: Registration_Started
fields.fieldText: Registration Started: {!Get_Candidate.Registration_Started__c}

fields.name: Registration_Status_Text
fields.fieldText: Registration Status: {!Get_Candidate.Registration_Status__c}

fields.name: RegistrationUpdate
fields.fieldText: Last Registration Update: {!Get_Candidate.Registration_Stage_Update__c}

fields.name: RegisterReminder
fields.fieldText: Registration Reminder Sent: {!Get_Candidate.Registration_Reminder_Date__c}

fields.name: RegistrationCompleted
fields.fieldText: Application Completed: {!Get_Candidate.Application_Completed_Date__c}

fields.name: Available_Action_Text
fields.fieldText: Available Actions

fields.name: Populate_Start_Date
fields.fieldText: Populate Start Date

textTemplates.name: BA_SMS_Portal_Details
textTemplates.text: Hi {!Get_Candidate.FirstName}, click the following link to login to your Blue Arrow Portal https://bit.ly/2Ni5TLg. You’ll be asked for you login details which you can reset if you’ve forgotten them. Thanks, Blue Arrow

textTemplates.name: BA_SMS_Register
textTemplates.text: Hi {!Get_Candidate.FirstName}, Thanks for choosing Blue Arrow to help you find your next role. Click the following link to complete your registration https://bit.ly/3jhOM6K. You can complete in your own time; saving your progress and returning to your registration any time. We hope to welcome you soon. Thanks, Blue Arrow

textTemplates.name: BA_SMS_Reminder
textTemplates.text: Hi {!Get_Candidate.FirstName}, we noticed you began to register with us. You can pick up where you left off anytime by clicking this link. You’ll be asked for you login details which you can reset if you’ve forgotten them https://bit.ly/2Ni5TLg. Thanks Blue Arrow

textTemplates.name: Tate_SMS_Portal
textTemplates.text: Hi {!Get_Candidate.FirstName}, click the following link to login to your Tate Portal https://bit.ly/3t04UyI. You’ll be asked for you login details which you can reset if you’ve forgotten them. Thanks, Tate

textTemplates.name: Tate_SMS_Register
textTemplates.text: Hi {!Get_Candidate.FirstName}, Thanks for choosing Tate to help you find your next role. Click the following link to create your account and start your registration https://bit.ly/2R2Pyfb. You can complete in your own time; saving your progress and returning to your registration any time. We hope to welcome you soon. Thanks, Tate

textTemplates.name: Tate_SMS_Reminder
textTemplates.text: Hi {!Get_Candidate.FirstName}, we noticed you began to register with us. You can pick up where you left off anytime by clicking this link. You’ll be asked for you login details which you can reset if you’ve forgotten them https://bit.ly/3t04UyI. Thanks Tate
